case_title: JONES, FLORINE vs. MANIGO, DEBORAH et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MANIGO, DEBORAH ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MANIGO, DEBORAH
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF MAY-31-1994, OVERRULED 5 DAYS TO ANSWER.

JUDGEMENT IS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, FLORINE JONES IS AWARDED RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 1020 SHOTWELL SAN FRANCISCO. PHYSICAL EVICTION IS TO BE STAYED THROUGH 8-1-94, LL:59PM. RENTS AND DAMAGES SHALL BE WAIVED THROUGH 8-1-94. IF DEFENDANT, DEBORAH MANIGO AND MINOR CHILDREN MOVE BY 8-1-94, 11:59PM, PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY WILL ENTER A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WITH THE COURT. A JUDGEMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF SHALL BE ENTERED IF DEFENDANT AND MINOR CHILDREN DO NOT MOVE. THERE IS A FURTHER STIPULATION OF A MUTUAL RESTRAINING ORDER FOR BOTH SIDES. NEITHER PARTY WILL HARASS THE OTHER SIDE. DEFENDANT, DEBORAH MANIGO, MAY SEEK AN APPROPRIATE REMEDY OF CONTEMPT IF PLAINTIFF VIOLATES RESTRAINING ORDER. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A VERIFIED VIOLATION OF RESTRAINING ORDER WITH 24 HOURS NOTICE TO DEFENDANT. AN ORDER FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES OF 1020 SHOTWELL, SAN FRANCISCO, SHALL ISSUE AGAINST DEBORAH MANIGO AND TWO MINORS IF RESTRAINING ORDER IS VIOLATED.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MANIGO, DEBORAH
